channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — May 17, 2026
item.description: A complex web of geopolitical tensions continues to unfold across the globe, from the Middle East, where a fragile ceasefire holds amidst targeted strikes and evolving drone warfare, to East Asia, where a US President's statements have prompted a sov...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 16, 2026
item.description: From global flashpoints to the cutting edge of artificial intelligence, and from the shifting sands of geopolitics to critical debates on media independence, today's news offers a comprehensive look at the forces shaping our world.

item.title: The VENCAst — May 15, 2026
item.description: From the global stage to local headlines, and the cutting edge of science and technology, you are listening to "The VENCAst," your daily summary of the news that shapes our world. I am your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, bringing you the lates...
